title: ichthyostomum pygmaeum
intro: Ichthyostomum pygmaeum, also known as the dwarf sea squirt, is a type of marine bryozoan, not a plant. However, I can provide you with information on the Ichthyostoma, which is an aquatic plant.  The Ichthyostoma is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, and can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions for consumption.
